query: SELECT gi.id, gi.category_id, gi.title, gi.image_url FROM gallery_images gi WHERE gi.category_id IN (4, 5) ORDER BY gi.category_id, gi.display_order
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user reQhEQm8VKDhmxs.root --database TPXNrRKBQNE8qaxNyKenmM --execute SELECT gi.id, gi.category_id, gi.title, gi.image_url FROM gallery_images gi WHERE gi.category_id IN (4, 5) ORDER BY gi.category_id, gi.display_order
